title: Glassy-Jelly Canadian Sour Cream Casserole
description: A sweet and comforting Canadian dish featuring a glassy-jelly inspired sour cream and chive dip, marinated in a soothing miso glaze, perfect for a high-protein friendly meal.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour and sugar.
Add the softened butter and mix until a crumbly mixture forms.
Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, sour cream, and chopped chives.
Pour the sour cream mixture over the crust.
In a small bowl, whisk together the miso paste and water to make a glaze.
Pour the glaze over the sour cream mixture.
Bake for 35 minutes, or until the edges are set and the center is slightly jiggly.
Let cool for 10 minutes, then refrigerate for at least 2 hours to allow the jelly to set.
Drizzle the confectioners sugar over the top before serving.
